scroll

You've tracked your sleep.
Your steps.
Your macros.

Nobody tracked
your capacity.

You've tried the apps.
The journals.
The breathing exercises.

None of them showed you
the pattern.

Because the pattern
isn't in the data.

It's in the signal
underneath the data.

THIS IS WHAT ORBITAL TRACKS

74%
RESOURCED

← drag to shift capacity →

Your orb looks different.
It reads your patterns.

90 DAYS OF DATA

Rendered as a constellation.

Every point is a day. Every color is a truth you couldn't see before.

Cyan = resourced  ·  Amber = elevated  ·  Crimson = depleted

The executive who has everything and feels nothing.

The parent who loves their kids and is running on empty.

The athlete whose training is identical but some days feel impossible.

The therapist who holds space for everyone but themselves.

The person who searches "why am I always tired" at 2am.

The one who looks completely fine.

You.
